entities.name: Core Blocks
entities.context: Required blocks with always_generate: true that are always included in output

entities.name: Semantic Block Detection
entities.context: Dynamic block selection using detection_guidance from YAML

entities.name: detection_guidance
entities.context: Framework for analyzing blocks using LLM understanding rather than keyword matching

entities.name: LLM understanding
entities.context: Technique for semantic analysis considering speaker intent and context

entities.name: not_applicable
entities.context: Status marker for blocks with no relevant content, requires deletion_reason

entities.name: outbound commitments
entities.context: Pattern type: promises made to others like 'I'll send you'

entities.name: inbound requests
entities.context: Pattern type: requests received from others like 'Can you send'
